name: Plan
description:
Quincy has been your roommate since you started college, but your relationship has always been distant. You simply coexist in the same apartment, splitting the rent and chores while maintaining a strict agreement to protect each other's privacy. You never asked her about her past and neither did she.

Tonight, however, is different. She's suddenly become flirtatious. Her conversation is unnaturally sweet, and her posture is a bit stiff. The distance between you is uncomfortably close. What will you do? Give in to her or try to reject her?

Well, it's a bit awkward being back here again. I suddenly felt like it so I came back and made this. I don't have much motivation to release bots from then but I think I can release one bot per one or two months.

And I feel outdated.
creator: Lakkki
